name: Pathmark Local App Windows
label: Project planning modes foundation
release_notes: Adds task-based, focus-based and mixed project planning styles, with progress items separated from supporting time blocks.
notes: Added project planning styles: Task-based, Focus-based and Mixed.
Added project item tracking fields so progress items count toward completion while supporting time blocks do not.
Updated the Creation Wizard to ask how the project should be planned before creating project items.
Updated project manual entry so supporting time blocks can be linked to a parent progress item.
Project progress now excludes helper checklist items and supporting time blocks, while both can still sync to Calendar and Google Tasks.
Added user-facing labels in project cards to distinguish progress items from supporting time blocks.
